about.heroDescription: Netherlands-led governance with India-based engineering execution support for industrial EPC projects.
about.interfaceStatement: An interface between governance, coordination, and execution.
about.timelineDescription: From engineering legacy to structured global EPC delivery.
about.expertise: Project Controls Leadership, Program Management, Contract and Financial Governance, Risk Analysis, and Multicultural Team Development.
about.p1: PCE BV is a trusted provider of engineering, procurement, and execution support services, specialized in detail engineering, project controls, and documentation.
about.p2: Founded and registered with KVK on 30 April 2025, PCE BV is co-founded by Kiran V. Kulkarni and Nishikant V. Choudhary.
about.p3: Our mission is to deliver engineering excellence in the simplest and most effective way while ensuring compliance with international standards.
about.p4: With over three decades of EPC and project controls expertise, we support chemicals, petrochemicals, energy, and infrastructure clients with disciplined delivery.

projects.heading: Our Project Experience
projects.subheading: Selected references from engineering, estimation, and project controls engagements.
projects.selectPrompt: Select an engineering profile to evaluate full execution scope and key deliverables.

project1.name: Petrochemical Plant Design
project1.description: Comprehensive detail engineering and multi-discipline coordination support for large-scale industrial fluid processing complexes.
project1.scope: Execution of comprehensive multi-disciplinary detail design frameworks, process workflow optimization, and high-density line configuration analysis.
project1.deliverables: Full-lifecycle intelligent 3D Plant Models, As-Built site updates, P&ID optimization layers, and cross-functional clash detection reviews.

project2.name: Multi-Discipline 3D Engineering
project2.description: Continuous provisions of advanced structural and process execution design models optimizing infrastructure modifications across active industrial environments.
project2.scope: Stress calculation, dynamic loading updates, piping material takeoff configurations, and integration interfaces for vendor equipment modules.
project2.deliverables: Coordinated 3D structural models, complete isometric documentation matrices, detailed equipment layout schemes, and precise estimation manifests.

project3.name: MEG Facility EPC Support
project3.description: Integrated project execution coordination, delivery governance validation, and multi-discipline design engineering assistance for major processing facilities.
project3.scope: On-site engineering interface checkouts, technical verification of incoming licensor designs, detailed drawings review, and constructability tracking.
project3.deliverables: Construction coordination records, certified detailed execution drawings, field installation checklists, and completed operational commissioning support logs.

project4.name: Power Plant Detail Engineering
project4.description: Comprehensive detail design engineering services and complete multi-disciplinary structural modeling for an international thermal power plant.
project4.scope: Full-scale structural detailing, multidisciplinary schematic generation, system layout designs, and coordination of vendor interface models.
project4.deliverables: Intelligent multi-discipline 3D plant models up to As-Built status, optimized piping layout drawings, and technical specification sheets.

project5.name: Industrial BOG Motor Systems Engineering
project5.description: Specialized engineering and multi-discipline execution support for the integration and deployment of Boil-Off Gas (BOG) motor assemblies.
project5.scope: Technical evaluation, interface compatibility mapping, system load balancing configurations, and functional specification matching.
project5.deliverables: Certified integration layout blueprints, precise supply documentation indices, and operational safety verification metrics.

project6.name: Petrochemical Complex Linear Alkyl Benzene Prebid Estimation
project6.description: High-accuracy prebid estimation and engineering support framework optimizing early-phase tender submissions for heavy industrial plants.
project6.scope: Material takeoff analysis, structural layout feasibility assessments, design parameter evaluations, and engineering resource estimation.
project6.deliverables: Comprehensive technical bid submission packages, optimized engineering cost baselines, and early-stage layout frameworks.

project7.name: Industrial Processing Facility Enquiry Engineering
project7.description: Strategic engineering validation, specification alignment, and enquiry analysis support for core equipment and material processing systems.
project7.scope: Technical requisition evaluations, vendor design reviews, specification compliance monitoring, and procurement package optimization.
project7.deliverables: Validated technical enquiry reports, cross-discipline compliance matrices, and optimized procurement requisition packages.

project8.name: Continuous 3D Plant Engineering Provisions
project8.description: Multi-year programmatic provision of advanced 3D engineering, structural modifications, and detail piping system configurations for global engineering teams.
project8.scope: Continuous stress analysis variations, ongoing clash detection reviews, mechanical layout adaptations, and operational design interface tracking.
project8.deliverables: Live 3D asset model data baselines, updated structural isometric configurations, and coordinated multidisciplinary engineering work packages.

project9.name: FEED Phase Piping MTO Estimation
project9.description: Dedicated Front-End Engineering Design (FEED) phase estimation, handling extensive piping Material Take-Off (MTO) generation and resource optimization.
project9.scope: On-site billing verification frameworks, bulk quantity calculations from preliminary flowsheets, and multi-discipline baseline alignments.
project9.deliverables: Certified high-accuracy piping material takeoff matrices, preliminary weight estimation structures, and resource-to-hours billing logs.

project10.name: Heavy Industrial Processing Equipment Engineering & Fabrication Support
project10.description: Long-term engineering execution, mechanical modeling, and fabrication coordination frameworks optimizing major asset deployments for process industries.
project10.scope: Mechanical asset integrity verifications, detail drafting for raw fabrication packages, vendor alignment, and constructability constraint tracking.
project10.deliverables: Certified manufacturing-ready fabrication datasets, verified mechanical equipment specifications, and quality review checklists.

footer.description: PCE BV provides engineering, project controls, and documentation services for chemicals, petrochemicals, energy, and infrastructure projects.

founder.bio: Accomplished project controls and program management leader with 32+ years of expertise in planning, risk, cost, and change management across major industrial projects.

founder-nishikant.bio: Experienced leader in project controls and program management with 32+ years of expertise in planning, risk, cost, and change management for major energy, chemicals, and infrastructure projects across Europe, the Middle East, and Asia.

founder-kiran.bio: Strategic engineering leader with deep expertise in multi-discipline execution, process engineering, and project delivery. Leads PCE PL Mumbai operations and coordinates execution excellence across EPC programs.
